# game-build-team

> A Claude Code skill that orchestrates a team of AI agents (Manager, Recon Analyst,
> Creative Director, Logic Developer, Animation Developer, Tester) to build Godot 4 /
> GDScript game features behind two unskippable gates — a rapid headless test gate and
> an "is it fun" creative gate — capped by the Manager's thorough on-device final pass.
> Built on the dynamic Workflow engine. Pausable/resumable across sessions and
> usage-limit cutoffs.

## Install (in Claude Code)
/plugin marketplace add Varalix-Digitech-Solutions/game-build-team-skill
/plugin install game-build-team@game-build-team

## Use
Write a real spec first (acceptance criteria, feel, invariants), then ask Claude Code:
"/game-build-team build the tower-upgrade feature against docs/design/tower-upgrade.md"

## What you get
- The feature built as a vertical slice: gameplay logic + game-feel/juice pass + real tests
- Verified: headless suite green, acceptance criteria asserted on the real call path, fresh screenshot vs the design contract, project invariants intact
- Judged fun: readable / responsive / satisfying / on-theme / fair, against the feature's own brief
- Proven on-device: the Manager builds, installs, and launches the fresh APK on real hardware at the end

## Key properties
- Two unskippable gates: the build/test loop is a deterministic Workflow program; "done" is a loop condition in code
- Rapid iteration: in-loop testing runs on a fast source-render simulation (seconds per round); the on-device pass happens once at the end
- Pausable and resumable across sessions and usage-limit cutoffs (durable state.json + usage watchdog with graceful wrap-up)
- Scales to your machine: parallel builders sized to host free memory
- 49 companion skills installed project-local (GodotPrompter Godot domain skills + Karpathy LLM coding-discipline guidelines), no fallback — a missing skill stops the run loudly

## Requirements
Claude Code, Godot 4.x on PATH, Node.js. For on-device verification: adb + an Android device (tests still gate without one).
